title: Monsoon Nutty Cookie Dumplings
description: A nutty and dense Irish-inspired dish featuring egg-free-friendly cookies mixed with nuts for a unique snack or appetizer.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a cookie press or ice cream scoop with coconut oil.
In a mixing bowl, combine oat flour, almond butter, coconut oil, maple syrup, cinnamon powder, and salt. Mix until well combined.
Fold in ground hazelnuts and chocolate chips gently to keep the texture light.
Using the prepared cookie press, pipe dough into small balls or use ice cream scoop for dumplings. Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes until golden brown. Allow to cool slightly before serving.
Serve warm as an appetizer or snack.
